claims.summary: Authorship context should retain exact wall and monotonic timing distinct from later finalization.
claims.disposition: Verified lived-state witness timing and source snapshot fields.

claims.summary: Witness sidecar persistence should not delay report persistence.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded asynchronous writer and explicit saturation/crash gaps.

claims.summary: Later review should append reconciliation rather than rewrite authorship context.
claims.disposition: Verified immutable authorship witness and append-only reconciliation events.

claims.summary: Shadow trend and named friction should be compared across the authored window.
claims.disposition: Routed to a felt-mechanism study with exact or temporal identity labeling.

claims.summary: Qualitative texture prose should be copied into witness metadata.
claims.disposition: Rejected by the no-prose boundary; the exact canonical report remains the qualitative anchor.
